name: Steak Diane
recipeInstructions:
1. Flatten steaks to 1/4 inch thickness between sheets of dampened waxed paper.
2. In a small bowl, combine Worcestershire sauce, lemon juice, mustard, cognac, sherry, and cornstarch. Mix well.
3. In a large heavy skillet, heat butter and oil over moderately high heat until foam subsides.
4. Sauté steaks about 45 seconds on each side for medium rare. Transfer steaks to a plate.
5. Sauté shallots in drippings over moderately low heat, stirring, until soft.
6. Stir broth mixture into the skillet with any juices that have accumulated on the plate. Boil sauce, stirring, 1 minute or until thickened.
7. Pour sauce over steaks. Sprinkle with parsley.
8. Serves 2.
